pipeline.description: Generator that creates OpenShift manifests for pipeline.

apply-infra.description: Generator that applies OpenShift manifests for pipeline.

setup-secrets.description: Sets GitHub Actions secrets and OpenShift GHCR pull secret for the pipeline.

deployment.description: Generator that creates OpenShift manifests for project deployment.

sandbox.description: Generator that creates a sandbox deployment for rapid local iteration (local build, push to OC internal registry).
